self_report.viz_verdict: The plot of log L − log U is strictly positive on [1,10], so the asserted lower bound L exceeds the asserted upper bound U, making the chain L < P < U impossible.
self_report.notes: Direct check at n=1 gives (3/e)^{3/2} ≈ 1.16 > 1 = product > (1/e)^{1/2} ≈ 0.607, violating both halves; visualization confirms L > U for all n ≥ 1, so the bounds are swapped from the classical Putnam 1996 B2 statement.
